name: Steak Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steaks to 3/4-inch thickness.
2. Place steaks between sheets of waxed paper and pound slightly by hand.
3. Melt half the butter in a pan, add green onion slices, and sauté.
4. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, parsley, and lemon juice. Heat well and keep warm.
5. Melt remaining butter in another skillet.
6. Add steaks and sauté quickly (2 minutes per side).
7. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
8. Spoon the butter & onion mixture over the steaks.
9. Flambe the steaks by heating brandy, pouring it over the steaks in the pan, and igniting.
10. Place hot steaks on a serving dish and pour pan juices over them.
11. Sprinkle with sliced green onion tops and lemon peel.
12. Serve immediately.
